transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to know if a physical therapist is covered under my plan. It's Dr. Renner's office.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can check that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your plan?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Marcus. I see you're on the Silverline PPO plan. Let me check Dr. Renner's network status now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good news—Dr. Renner's office is in-network under Silverline PPO. You'd just have a $30 copay per visit.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh perfect, that's way better than I expected.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Glad to hear it. You also don't need a referral for physical therapy on this plan, just a visit limit of 20 sessions per year.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Got it, that's really helpful, thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Marcus. Anything else I can help with today?
